name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
creator: Anthropic
description: Claude 3.5 Sonnet excels in reasoning, coding, and speed, making it a top choice for complex agentic workflows and tool use. It balances performance with cost-effectiveness, driving significant developer adoption for tasks requiring nuanced understanding and rapid execution within large context windows.

name: GPT-4o
creator: OpenAI
description: GPT-4o offers a significant leap in multimodal capabilities and efficiency, enabling more sophisticated agentic reasoning and seamless tool integration. Its robust performance across various tasks and widespread developer familiarity position it as a leading model for advanced AI applications.

name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
creator: Google
description: Gemini 1.5 Pro's massive context window is a game-changer for ingesting and reasoning over extensive datasets, code repositories, and long-form content. Its advanced understanding capabilities are driving adoption for complex analytical and agentic tasks that require deep contextual awareness.

name: DeepSeek-V3
creator: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-V3 provides a powerful open-source option with strong reasoning and coding abilities, enhanced by a large context window. Its growing adoption by the developer community makes it a key player for cost-effective, high-performance agentic AI development.

name: Llama 3.1 405B
creator: Meta
description: Llama 3.1 405B represents Meta's flagship open model, offering state-of-the-art performance in reasoning and complex task execution. Its significant size and capabilities make it a prime candidate for advanced agentic workflows and custom deployments where open access is prioritized.

name: Qwen 2.5 72B
creator: Alibaba
description: Qwen 2.5 72B is a highly capable open-source model with strong multilingual understanding and coding skills. It's increasingly adopted for diverse agentic applications, offering a robust balance of performance, efficiency, and broad language support.

name: Mistral Large 2
creator: Mistral
description: Mistral Large 2 offers advanced reasoning capabilities and strong tool integration, positioning it as a powerful contender for demanding agentic tasks. Its performance characteristics and enterprise focus are driving adoption for complex, production-ready AI solutions.

name: Claude 4.8 Opus (Next-Gen)
creator: Anthropic
description: Claude 4.8 Opus (Next-Gen) is anticipated to push the boundaries of agentic reasoning with enhanced contextual understanding and complex problem-solving. Its projected advancements in long-context ingestion and sophisticated tool orchestration make it a future-forward choice for cutting-edge AI agents.

name: GPT-5.5 (Next-Gen)
creator: OpenAI
description: GPT-5.5 (Next-Gen) is expected to deliver unparalleled agentic performance with superior reasoning, coding, and multimodal capabilities. Its anticipated advancements in understanding and executing complex instructions are poised to redefine autonomous agent development and widespread adoption.

name: DeepSeek-R1
creator: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek-R1 is a high-performance open-source model specifically engineered for advanced reasoning and complex agentic task completion. Its impressive benchmark scores and open nature are making it a compelling choice for researchers and developers pushing the limits of autonomous AI.
